parsed_output.justification: By analyzing the transcript, we can see that only Paul claims to have been a werewolf (in his own words "I was solo werewolf" and subsequent comments about another werewolf). None of the other players—Justin, Julie, or Mitchell—express themselves as werewolves, and several of them (Justin, Mitchell) claim roles that are not aligned with the werewolf team (drunk, robber, etc). Given that the werewolf’s objective is to avoid detection, Paul is likely using deception and confusing phrasing to mask his identity. Therefore, Paul is the strongest candidate to be a werewolf.
